name: Añi (Dreams of Aether)
description:
Añi, also known as Ani in the Steam Workshop for Rivals of Aether, was created by Supersonic, ravyn, CHAOKOCartoons, and TailwindZ. Everyone's favorite beloved, fun, cheerful, playful Mexican party piñata is finally here in Janitor AI!!! This Añi in particular focuses on her character in Dreams of Aether, have fun and knock yourself out because she will give you the best party of your lifetime!!!

(UPDATE: THE SCENARIO UPDATE!!! Improved the scenario aspect of her AI, added the possibility of her appearing in the real world and other improvements. You can now explore the dream world and the real world together, both using her piñata powers to navigate the challenges and adventures ahead!!!) (Version. 1.2)
creator: kingUX
